# Mass Mailing Subscription Snippet With Name

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:e04f9dcb0262f101b90be9f2a6e5e68d68cb701750da26faee32ad6d3bf3df1f
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends the functionality of mass mailings to support asking for
the contact name directly in the subscription snippet.

If you want to get partners created automatically and linked to the contacts,
you can additionally install the `mass_mailing_partner`

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. Go to any website page.
2. Insert any structure block.
3. Insert the *Newsletter* block as you would usually, inside a structure one.
4. Choose the newsletter of your liking.
5. Press *Save*.

## Bug Tracker

In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
